rent.note: furnished 1BR in Gueliz (modern district); studio 300-600 USD/mo; 1BR Gueliz $500

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; $40-80 USD range; Maroc Telecom fiber available

groceries.note: Marjane hypermarkets + Djemaa el-Fna souks; affordable fresh produce and spices

diningOut.note: tajine + couscous $3-8; tourist-area restaurants pricier; Gueliz has good cafes

transit.note: petits taxis + Careem; bus available; $50-100/mo range

coworking.note: Goworking/Fraktal Coworking in Gueliz; ~150 USD/mo; Regus from MAD 2,590/mo

simData.note: Maroc Telecom/Orange MA unlimited data; ~100 MAD/mo (~$10)

misc.note: hammam ($3-10), entertainment, souks, personal care, day trips to Atlas Mountains

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers applied to RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Raise for peak tourist/weather months, lower for off-peak.

evidence.claim: Marrakech monthly cost $1,200 total: accommodation $500, food $300, transport $100, coworking $150, entertainment $150
evidence.quote: For Marrakech specifically, the monthly cost of living is estimated at $1,200. a typical monthly budget breaks down as follows: Accommodation: $500, Food: $300, Transport: $100, Coworking: $150, Entertainment: $150

evidence.claim: Marrakech furnished apartments MAD 3,000-8,000/month; 2BR furnished MAD 7,500-12,000
evidence.quote: Average prices range from 3,000-8,000 MAD monthly for furnished apartments in central areas. Two-bedroom furnished apartments cost 7,500–12,000 MAD (€720–€1,150)

evidence.claim: Marrakech utilities $40-80 USD/month including electricity, water, internet
evidence.quote: Utilities such as electricity, water, and internet usually cost between 40 and 80 USD per month

evidence.claim: Regus Marrakech private office from MAD 2,590/person/month; Goworking in Gueliz center
evidence.quote: private offices at Regus start from MAD 2,590 per person per month. Goworking, a cozy co-working space located in the center of Marrakesh Gueliz
